judgeScores.justification: The structure exhibits excellent organizational logic with intuitive, type-based top-level categories (photos, documents, code) and consistent snake_case naming throughout. The 2-3 level nesting is well-balanced, particularly the year-based subfolders for personal photos and functional separation of code into frontend/backend/data_and_ml. All ~80 files were moved with zero root stragglers, and the MANIFEST.md is comprehensive with file counts and clear rationale, though the archives section appears truncated in the provided output.
